title: Getting Started with Support Ticketing
body: Welcome to our support platform. This guide covers how to submit, track, and manage support tickets. Use clear descriptions and select the appropriate category for faster resolution.

title: Common Account Issues and Fixes
body: If you're experiencing login problems, try resetting your password via the 'Forgot Password' link. For profile updates, go to Account Settings. Ensure your email is verified for full access.

title: Understanding Invoice Charges
body: Your invoice includes all charges for the billing period, including recurring subscriptions and usage-based fees. A detailed breakdown is available in the billing portal. If you see an unrecognized charge, compare it with your plan details.

title: Billing Dispute Resolution
body:
Standard resolution guidance for overcharge disputes:
1. Verify the charge against your plan and usage records in the Billing section.
2. If an overcharge is confirmed, open a billing dispute ticket with the invoice ID and specific line items.
3. Our billing team will review and respond within 2 business days. Escalate to priority high if the amount exceeds $100 or the charge is recurring.
4. For immediate refund processing, attach proof of the incorrect charge and request a priority escalation.

title: How to Escalate a Ticket
body: To escalate a ticket, change the priority to high and add the 'escalated' tag. Notify the team lead through the comments. Escalated billing tickets are reviewed within 4 hours during business days.

title: Refund Policy and Processing
body: Our refund policy covers duplicate charges, overcharges, and service disruptions exceeding 24 hours. Refund requests must be submitted via ticket with supporting evidence. Processing takes 5-7 business days.

title: Using Knowledge Base Search Effectively
body: Use keywords related to your issue. Our search engine prioritizes title matches and tags. For billing problems, search 'billing dispute' or 'overcharge' to find resolution articles.
